name: AgentTeam
summary: The persona-routing brain of Bill Whalen's Agent Team Starter Kit, ported to a single rapplication. Given a project goal, returns the outcome frame, persona route, paste-ready GitHub issue body, and the needs-you questions the team would surface.
tagline: Plan a project the way the kit would.
egg_note: Stateless per call. Plans are returned in the response envelope; no shipped state.

args.goal: Build a Dataverse-backed intake form that routes customer feedback through Power Automate into a Copilot Studio bot, with a Power BI dashboard for the support lead.
